commands: Consider how data might not be evenly distributed and how that could affect sorting speed.
Look into whether Timsort really is the best choice, since it might slow things down with too many function calls.
Maybe suggest a simpler sorting method that uses less memory overall.
Check if the locking mechanism for updates could cause delays and think about alternatives.
Make sure to explain how you would test the performance of the sorting and searching to see if it really works.
